title: Local File Folder Link
excerpt:
I’m trying to figure out how to get a file folder to open in explorer so that all users would be able to click on it and reach the same folder in our network. 
It appears the link function is automatically adding http://…

posts.author: ease (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to figure out how to get a file folder to open in explorer so that all users would be able to click on it and reach the same folder in our network.

It appears the link function is automatically adding http:// in front of the link, instead of allowing file:// to work properly in the browser. Is there a way to fix this?

posts.author: magnugr (Magnus Greiff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Don’t think this is possible at the moment
See this feature request
https://community.monday.com/t/link-column-with-a-local-link-not-web-link/
